cooperates.cooperate_desc: Xavier and Bane are best poke and wave clear duo in brawl. Xavier's circle also speeds up Bane and immobilizes enemies for high Crab shoot or Sharks accuracy.

counters.counter_desc:
Bane can speed up to run away from Minsitthar's ultimate, he can waste his set up with his shark, heal back while Minsitthar cannot.

The poke damage from Crab is so fast that Minsitthar cannot reduce while the sprint from beer is so quick that Minsitthar cannot skewer.

dominants.dominant_desc:
For this strategy, your kid doesn't matter, her kid, his wife, your career, it doesn't matter, just hit the turret.

Reserve your ultimate for the turret only. It deals a lot of damage based on your magic power and physical attack

It is best to used when there's ally minion in the turret, and most enemies will dodge the sharks, so you can increase the damage by Impure Rage.

If possible, use Enhanced attack from passive to peel off the turret.

Gauge the distance and aim the direction before casting.

With 40% cooldown reduction, your sharks will be ready every 18 seconds.
Clear wave fast will buy some time for you to heal back with 2nd skill, use it on the enemy or use Crab on the minion to bounce to enemy.

Keep in mind that Revitalize will amplify your heal, so always use 2nd skill during Revitalize without under any anti heal effect and heal your allies as well so that they can be the meatshield for you for few seconds.

At 40% cooldown reduction and max level, your 2nd skill only has 2.1 seconds cooldown, sprint for 2.5 seconds and at least 25% health per cast, so you may reserve Revitalize for healing allies instead.

Use the nearby bush, sprint with 2nd skill and throw sharks. If possible, don't make it so obvious that you're eating the turret, as enemies will try to clear minions before they arrive in their turrets.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Thrill gives damage that will be increased by Holy Crystal, it also provides more heal for second skill.

Bargain as Bane needs a lot of expensive items and might die often to buy

Impure Rage to increase Poke damage from Crab or Shark damage if you can approach the turret. It also restores mana.

Inspire for constant sharks swimming.

Brave Smite: spam Crab to heal back waiting for your noob marksmen respawning.

equips.equip_desc:
Goal: Aim for items that give most magic, physical damage and cooldown reduction. You might not get full of this build most of the time.

This build gives max 40% cooldown reduction, 300+ magic power and physical attack. With burst damage from LT and BoD to clear wave quickly.

With 2500 gold, you can buy 3x magic wand. These makes your 2nd ability only have 7 seconds cooldown, and heal at least 15% max health per cast.

The Magic Necklace might not be too impactful, but can amount to one more cast time of 2nd skill if you survive long enough.
After the first death, at lv7, your 2nd skill only has 5 second cooldown with these items.

Rushing Lightning Truncheon right away is not a wise choice. Go for these little items that cost you less than half a Truncheon, but you have 25% total cooldown reduction, as you might have a hard time hoarding up money.

Book can be upgraded into Lightning, Bow upgraded into War Axe, depending if you need lifesteal and poke damage, or heal and shark damage first.

Sell boots at this point as you have 5% redundant cd reduction.

Bloodwings give a lot of magic power, compensates the speed lost and some survivability.

hero.hero_strength: Poke, sustain, speed, push all in one
hero.hero_weakness: Very squishy and item dependent.

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Bane is a hero in Mobile Legends, a multiplayer online battle arena (MOBA) game. He is a fighter-type hero who excels at dealing physical damage and controlling crowds.

Here's a breakdown of Bane's abilities and playstyle:

*Abilities:*

1. *Cursed Touch* (1st skill): Deals physical damage to enemies and slows them down.
2. *Tectonic Slam* (2nd skill): Deals physical damage to enemies and stuns them.
3. *Curse of Doom* (Ultimate): Deals physical damage to enemies and protects allies within a certain area.

*Playstyle:*

Bane is a melee fighter who excels at dealing physical damage and controlling crowds. He uses his abilities to initiate team fights, deal damage to enemies, and protect his allies.

*Strengths:*

- High physical damage output
- Good crowd control with his abilities
- Can initiate team fights with his ultimate
- Can protect allies with his ultimate

*Weaknesses:*

- Vulnerable to burst damage from enemy heroes
- Limited mobility, making it hard to chase or escape from enemies
- Dependent on his abilities to deal damage and control crowds

*Tips for playing Bane:*

- Use your abilities to initiate team fights and deal damage to enemies.
- Position yourself to maximize your damage output and control.
- Use your ultimate to protect your allies and turn the tide of team fights.
- Communicate with your team to coordinate strategies and execute team fights effectively.

hero.hero_overview:
Here's a comprehensive overview of Bane in Mobile Legends:

# Hero Details
- *Hero Name:* Bane
- *Hero Type:* Fighter
- *Role:* Initiator/Tank

# Abilities
1. *Cursed Touch* (1st Skill): Deals 250-350 (+100% Extra Physical Attack) points of Physical Damage to enemies and slows them by 30-40% for 1.5 seconds.
2. *Tectonic Slam* (2nd Skill): Deals 350-500 (+150% Extra Physical Attack) points of Physical Damage to enemies and stuns them for 1-1.5 seconds.
3. *Curse of Doom* (Ultimate): Deals 500-700 (+200% Extra Physical Attack) points of Physical Damage to enemies and protects allies within the area, absorbing up to 500-800 (+100% Extra Physical Attack) points of damage.

# Attributes
- *Physical Attack:* 120-140
- *Physical Defense:* 20-30
- *Magic Defense:* 10-20
- *HP:* 2500-3000
- *Movement Speed:* 240-260

# Playstyle
Bane excels at initiating team fights and dealing damage to enemies. He uses his abilities to control and lock down enemies, making it difficult for them to escape.
hero.hero_strength:
- High damage output
- Good crowd control
- Can initiate team fights
- Has a protective ultimate
hero.hero_weakness:
Alice,ling,freya and some sustain heros

# Weaknesses
- Vulnerable to burst damage
- Limited mobility
- Can be countered by heroes with high burst

counters.counter_desc: Enak banget buat counter Alpha karena jarak skill Alpha yang deket dan bikin dia gak bisa ngeheal. Kalo dimajuin pake ulti tinggal ulti balik + Flameshot, dijamin dia bakal ketar ketir
Tidak perlu dijelaskan

dominants.dominant_desc: Pastiin cicil musuh dengan pantulan skill 1 dari minion. Jangan terlalu maju sebelum level 4 walaupun bane bisa ngeheal. Baru yakin maju setelah ada ulti, dan juga pastiin stack pasif selalu full. Kalo khawatir habis mana bisa juga pake cara basic attack angin, lebih baik hilang 1 stack daripada 2 stack hilang karena habis durasi.

Bantu contest karena ulti bane sangat berguna buat acak-acak musuh dan nge-cc jungler musuh biar ga bisa retri. Damage bane baru berasa kalau udah jadi paling nggak 3 item, jadi selama early game main aman dan fokus bantu teamfight agar menang war.

Bane late game damage sangat mengerikan, kena ulti aja mm bisa seperempat darah. Bane juga bagus buat counter mm kayak claude, irithel, dan mm tabrak lain,bane juga bagus buat counter fanny biar mati kutu

emblems.emblem_desc:
-Thrill buat nambah magic power, boleh juga pake rupture atau inspire
-Weapon master bagus buat late game, boleh juga pake bargain hunter
-Lethal ignition boleh diganti sama impure rage atau temporal reign

dominants.dominant_desc:
Saat level 5 kamu langsung ambil turtle dan lanjut objektif buff, apabila memungkinkan culik beberapa hero musuh yang offside
saat mid game kamu bisa split push turret pada saat musuh sedang war
saat team fight kamu hanya perlu habiskan bagian depan musuh biarkan bagian belakang di ambil team kamu yang lain
dominants.dominant_title: Saat level 5, mid game, dan team fight

emblems.emblem_desc:
pertama kita ambil emblem assasin untuk penetrasi,damage,dan movement speed seperti yang sudah dijelaskan sebelumnya karna bane ini sangat lamban
-untuk talent nya kita ambil thrill untuk menambahkan damage kita di early game
-seasoned hunter untuk menambahkan damage kepada lord dan turtle sebesar 15% perlu digaris bawahi talent seasoned hunter tidak menambahkan damage retri
-quantum charge untuk memberikan movement speed sebesar 30% untuk 1,5 detik dan menambahkan hp 75-180 hp berskala dengan level
quantum charge digunakan untuk menambahkan movement speed kepada bane

equips.equip_desc:
tough boots untuk pengurangan durasi cc yang diberikan musuh
war axe untuk damage dan menambahkan true damage bane
thunderbelt agar bane lebih tanky dan lebih kuat di late game
endless battle untuk true damage dan movement speed bane
immortality agar lebih tanky dan lebih safety untuk maju maju kedepan
malefic apabila di musuh banyak hero hero tebal dan memiliki banyak physical defense

hero.hero_overview: pertama kamu unlock skill 1 saat baru respawn pakai itu sekali setelah cd nya balik lalu pakai lagi skill 1 nya.kamu ambil buff sesuai arah turtle spawn, kalo turtle start di jungle merah kamu start di merah, kalau turtle start di jungle ungu maka ambil jungle ungu. kalau ambil buff merah ambil buff hijau yang diatas nya, litho wanderer atau pokemon air tidak wajib diambil, kalau litho tidak diambil sama jungle atau mid lawan maka ambil saja.
hero.hero_strength: bane kalau early game kamu ambil objektif saja dan rotasi dikit untuk kill gold musuh apabila ada kesempatan. perlu di garis bawahi kalau bane sangat kuat di adu retri menggunakan ultimate nya, keluarkan ulti nya apabila darah turtle sudah mendekati dmg retri. di late game kamu hanya perlu ambush dan ciduk musuh sambil split push apabila ada kesempatan. bane ini juga sangat kuat di arah split push karna damage ke turret nya yang sangat tinggi.
hero.hero_weakness: kelemahan bane hanya di bagian mobilitas saja yang lelet dibanding jungler assasin.

data.recommend: REKOMENDASI TUTORIAL BANE BAGI PEMULA SAMPAI VETERAN

spell.spell_desc:
Retri sangat direkomendasikan untuk para user jungle karena memberikan efek pengurangan damage buff(creep) dan meningkatkan perolehan gold dan exp daripada creep. setelah membunuh 5 buff(creep), atau membunuh hero, atau assist dapat mengupgrade damage retri tersebut. terdapat 3 varian retribution: 
-ada retri merah untuk mengurangi damage lawan dan meningkatkan damage hero kita.
-ada retri ungu untuk mengurangi hp lawan perdetik dan menambah hp kita perdetik sesuai banyak hp lawan yang terkena retri.
-ada retri biru untuk mengurangi movement speed lawan dan menambah movement speed hero kita.
untuk bane sangat cocok menggunakan retri biru karna mobilitas bane yang sangat lamban untuk mengejar musuh yang mencoba escape dari war
